name: Kaushalya Infrastructure Development Corporation Limited
summary: Kaushalya Infrastructure Development Corporation Limited primarily engages in executing construction contracts relating to infrastructure and real estate developments in India. The company operates in two segments, Construction and Hotel. It develops highways, bridges, and industrial infrastructure; electrification and irrigation projects; and residential and commercial complexes. The company is also involved in the operation of hotels; and acquisition, development, and sale of land. Kaushalya Infrastructure Development Corporation Limited was incorporated in 1992 and is headquartered in Kolkata, India.
